CodeShare.description: Codeshare [Code-Teilungen mit Flügen verschiedener Fluggesellschaften] information for a particular journey event.

airlineCode.description: Code of cooperating airline [IATA-Code der Fluggesellschaft].

flightnumber.description: Flightnumber of cooperating airline journey [Flugnummer des Fluges der kooperierenden Fluggesellschaft].

ContinuationInfo.description: Differing continuation information in case the continuation doesn't take place at the start / beginning of the journey [Durchbindung an Unterwegshalten].

arrivalOrDepartureID.description: ID of arrival or departure the continuation takes place.

DirectionInfo.description: Optional direction information [Richtungstext] for a particular transport that may differ from the destination [Zielhalt] on some parts of the journey. Take care that a text and / or a particular stop-place [Haltestelle] may be provided.

stopPlaces.description: Optional list of stop-places [Haltestellen] the direction text refers to. May be more than one stop-place for cases like for instance 'Richtung Messe & Hauptbahnhof'.

text.description: Direction text [Richtungstext]. Must not necessarly be the name of a real stop-place [Haltestelle] (for instance 'Richtung Automobilmesse'). For instance before the stop 'fare' the transport has direction 'fare', after 'fare' has been reached maybe 'central station' or 'airport'.

attachments.description: Attachments for additional information that may be communicated to the traveller (download use-cases).

images.description: Images for additional information that may be communicated to the traveller.

links.description: Links for additional information that may be communicated to the traveller.

textShort.description: Optional short text of disruption communication.

ErrorDetail.description: Detailed error information on field level.

field.description: Name of field / element that raised the error.

ErrorResponse.description: API error object according to RFC7807.

errors.description: List of detailed errors in case multiple errors have lead to the surrounding error.

instanceId.description: Unique identifier for instance that raised the error.

JourneyBatchError.description: Batch response error for a particular journey.

JourneyBatchMatchByEventsRequest.description: Batch request to match journeys [Fahrten] / departures [Abfahrten] / arrivals [Ankünfte] by one ore more journey events [Fahrtereignisse].

requests.description: List of match requests. A maximum of 50 match requests is allowed.

returnJourneyEvents.description: Indicates whether to return all journey events [Fahrtereignisse] as well. Useful when the caller wants to match journeys and their journey events as well. Defaults to false.

timeTolerance.description: Tolerance in minutes (+x / -x minutes) for matching against time information. A maximum of 10 minutes is allowed.

JourneyBatchMatchByStartEndRequest.description: Batch request to match journeys [Fahrten] / departures [Abfahrten] / arrivals [Ankünfte] by scheduled journey start / end [geplanter Fahrtbeginn / Fahrtende] information.

requests.description: List of match requests. A maximum of 50 match requests is allowed.

returnJourneyEvents.description: Indicates whether to return all journey events [Fahrtereignisse] as well. Useful when the caller wants to match journeys and their journey events as well. Defaults to false.

timeTolerance.description: Tolerance in minutes (+x / -x minutes) for matching against time information. A maximum of 10 minutes is allowed.

JourneyBatchMatchResponse.description: Batch response to match journeys [Fahrten] / departures [Abfahrten] / arrivals [Ankünfte].

JourneyBatchRequest.description: Batch request to return mutiple journeys [Fahrten] at once.

includeOnlyJourneyInfo.description: Include only 'journeyID' and 'info' (JourneyInfo) and ommit journey events, messages and continuations.

includeReferences.description: Include journey references like relief [Entlastung], replace [Ersatz], continuation [Durchbindung] and travels-with [Vereinigung / Fluegelung].

journeyIDs.description: IDs of journeys [Fahrt-IDs]. A maximum of 500 journey-ids is allowed.

languages.description:
Languages to return, defaults to 'DE' and 'EN' (if available)
- DE (German)
- EN (English)
- FR (French)
- IT (Italian)
- CS (Czech)
- DA (Danish)
- ES (Spanish)
- NL (Dutch)
- PL (Polish)

separateCancelled.description: Separate cancelled events [ausgefallene Fahrtereignisse] in dedicated collection 'eventsCancelled'.

JourneyBatchResponse.description: Batch response to return mutiple journeys [Fahrten] at once.

erroneousJourneys.description: List of erroneous journeys for this particular batch request.

metaLastChangedTimestamps.description: List of meta last changed timestamps the returned journeys have been changed as fully-qualified-date (ISO-8601 with time-zone or offset).

additional.description: Indicates whether event is additional, meaning not be part of the regular schedule [Zusatzhalt]. Note: In case an event is cancelled and additional, it's considered as an cancelled additional stop [zurückgenommener Zusatzhalt].

arrivalOrDepartureID.description: ID of arrival or departure, depends on event type.

cancelled.description: Indicates whether event is cancelled [Haltausfall]. Note: In case an event is cancelled and additional, it's considered as an cancelled additional stop [zurückgenommener Zusatzhalt].

codeshares.description: List of codeshares [Code-Teilungen mit Flügen verschiedener Fluggesellschaften] for this particular journey at this arrival / departure.

messages.description: List of message-ids [Nachrichten IDs] for this particular event. IDs are pointing to the global 'messages' structure, containing disruption-communications [Störungskommunikationen], attributes [Fahrtmerkmale], notes [Hinweise], ris cause codes [RIS Kundengründe] and ris quality deviations [RIS Qualitätsabweichungen].

noPassengerChange.description: Indicates whether passengers are not allowed to enter / leave [kein Fahrgastwechsel].

onDemand.description: Indicates whether arrival / departure is an on demand stop [Bedarfshalt].

platform.description: Actual platform [Gleis, Bahnsteig, Plattform] the transport arrives / departs at, may be empty.

platformIfopt.description: Ifopt [DHID] of actual platform [Gleis, Bahnsteig, Plattform] the transport arrives / departs at, may be empty.

platformSchedule.description: Scheduled platform [Gleis, Bahnsteig, Plattform] the transport arrives / departs at.

platformScheduleIfopt.description: Ifopt [DHID] of scheduled platform [Gleis, Bahnsteig, Plattform] the transport arrives / departs at.

reliefBy.description: List of transports this journey at this particular event is reliefed by [Entlastungszug].

reliefFor.description: List of transports this journey at this particular event reliefs for [Entlastungszug].

replacedBy.description: List of transports this journey at this particular event is replaced by [Ersatzzug].

replacementFor.description: List of transports this journey at this particular event replaces [Ersatzzug].

time.description: Best known time information of stop as fully-qualified-date (ISO-8601 with time-zone or offset).

timeSchedule.description: Scheduled time [Soll] of stop as fully-qualified-date (ISO-8601 with time-zone or offset).

timeType.description:
Specifies on which information 'time' is based.
- SCHEDULE (Time source is schedule [Plan / Soll])
- PREVIEW (Time source is preview / forecast [Vorschau / Disposition / Prognose])
- REAL (Time source is real [Echt = passiert (kann nur in die Vergangenheit gesetzt werden)

travelsWith.description: List of journeys this journey at this particular event travels with [Vereinigung].

vehicleSequenceAvailable.description: Indicates the presence of a vehicle-sequence [Wagenreihung / Formation] for this journey at this particular arrival / departure.

JourneyEventBased.description: Event based [Fahrtereignisbasiert] information for a particular journey [Fahrtverlauf].

continuationBy.description: Continuation by successor journey, if available [Durchbindung am Ziel].

continuationFor.description: Continuation by predecessor journey, if available [Durchbindung am Start].

eventsCancelled.description: List of cancelled events [ausgefallene Fahrtereignisse (Abfahrten und Ankünfte)]. Only filled in case separation of cancelled events has been requested.

limit.description: Maximum number of results the caller has requested to return from provided offset.

offset.description: Pagination offset the caller has requested in order to navigate through results.

headerJourneyNumber.description: Header number of journey [Kopf-Fahrtnummer], may differ from number of journey.

journeyCancelled.description: Indicates whether whole journey has been cancelled.

scheduledStartTime.description: Scheduled start time [Geplante Startzeit] at scheduled start stop-place [Geplanter Starthalt] as fully-qualified-date (ISO-8601 with time-zone or offset).

type.description:
Defines whether journey [Fahrt] is regular or some kind of special.
- REGULAR (Regular scheduled journey)
- REPLACEMENT (Journey that replaces another journey)
- RELIEF (Journey that reliefs another journey)
- EXTRA (Journey that is somehow extra)

JourneyMatchByEventsRequest.description:
Single request to match journeys [Fahrten] / departures [Abfahrten] / arrivals [Ankünfte] by one ore more journey events [Fahrtereignisse] of a particular journey [Fahrt]. This enables the caller to match journeys also without knowing their start information

Attention: One particular request may lead to multiple results in case matching wasn't unique, all referenced by the same request id.

matchEvents.description: Matching criterias for journey event [Fahrtereignisse] information. Should be used in case no information on scheduled journey start is available. At least one event has to be provided. Multiple events are combined with AND operator.

requestID.description: Request id in order to find results for particular request within response list. Must be unique accross all requests. A maximum length of 50 is allowed.

transportTypes.description:
List of transport-types [Produktklassen] to return match results for, possible values are:
- HIGH_SPEED_TRAIN (High speed train [Hochgeschwindigkeitszug])
- INTERCITY_TRAIN (Inter city train [Intercityzug])
- INTER_REGIONAL_TRAIN (Inter regional train [Interregiozug])
- REGIONAL_TRAIN (Regional train [Regionalzug])
- CITY_TRAIN (City train [S-Bahn])
- SUBWAY (Subway [U-Bahn])
- TRAM (Tram [Strassenbahn])
- BUS (Bus [Bus])
- FERRY (Ferry [Faehre])
- SHUTTLE (Shuttle [Ruftaxi])
- FLIGHT (Flight [Flug])
- CHARTER_TRAIN (Charter train [Charterzug])
- UNKNOWN (Unknown)

If empty or omitted, CHARTER_TRAIN won't be returned by default.

Attention: One particular request may lead to multiple results in case matching wasn't unique, all referenced by the same request id.

JourneyMatchJourneyEvent.description: Matching criterias for journey event [Fahrtereignisse] information. At least one event has to be provided. Multiple events are combined with AND operator.

category.description: Optional category of journey event [externe Fahrtgattung nach Ausgabensteuerung].

dfid.description: Deutschlandweite Teil-Linien ID (DTID) of journey event. At least 'journeyNumber', 'operationalJourneyNumber', 'dtid', 'dfid' or 'line' + 'administrationID' has to be provided.

dtid.description: Deutschlandweite Fahrt ID (DFID) of journey event. At least 'journeyNumber', 'operationalJourneyNumber', 'dtid', 'dfid' or 'line' + 'administrationID' has to be provided.

journeyNumber.description: Journey-number [Fahrtnummer] of journey event. At least 'journeyNumber', 'operationalJourneyNumber', 'dtid', 'dfid' or 'line' + 'administrationID' has to be provided.

line.description: Line of journey [Linie] of journey event. At least 'journeyNumber', 'operationalJourneyNumber', 'dtid', 'dfid' or 'line' + 'administrationID' has to be provided.

operationalJourneyNumber.description: Operatinal journey-number [betriebliche Fahrtnumber] of journey event. At least 'journeyNumber', 'operationalJourneyNumber', 'dtid', 'dfid' or 'line' + 'administrationID' has to be provided.

time.description: Optional time of journey-event [Abfahrts- oder Ankunftszeit ohne Datumsanteil] in format 'HH:mm:ss'.

arrivalOrDepartureID.description: ID of arrival or departure, depends on event type.

index.description: Index of journey event [Fahrtereigniss] within list of journey events.

scheduledTime.description: Scheduled time [Geplante Zeit] of journey event at stop-place as fully-qualified-date (ISO-8601 with time-zone or offset).

JourneyMatchJourneyStartEnd.description: Matching criterias for scheduled journey origin [Geplanter Fahrtbeginn] and optional journey destination [Geplantes Fahrtende] information. Should be used in case information on scheduled journey start is available. At least one of 'matchStartEnd' or 'matchEvents' must be used.

endTime.description: Optional scheduled end time [Geplante Zielzeit] at scheduled end stop-place [Geplanter Zielhalt] as fully-qualified-date (ISO-8601 with time-zone or offset).

headerAdministrationID.description: ID of the header-administration [Kopf-Verwaltung] of journey.

startAdministrationID.description: ID of the start-administration [Start-Verwaltung] at scheduled start stop-place [Geplanter Starthalt].

startCategory.description: Optional category [externe Fahrtgattung] at scheduled start stop-place [Geplanter Starthalt].

startDfid.description: Deutschlandweite Teil-Linien ID (DTID) at scheduled start stop-place [Geplanter Starthalt]. At least 'startJourneyNumber', 'startOperationalJourneyNumber', 'startDtid' oder 'startDfid' must be provided.

startDtid.description: Deutschlandweite Fahrt ID (DFID) at scheduled start stop-place [Geplanter Starthalt]. At least 'startJourneyNumber', 'startOperationalJourneyNumber', 'startDtid' oder 'startDfid' must be provided.

startJourneyNumber.description: Number of journey [Fahrtnummer] at scheduled start stop-place [Geplanter Starthalt]. At least 'startJourneyNumber', 'startOperationalJourneyNumber', 'startDtid' oder 'startDfid' must be provided.

startOperationalJourneyNumber.description: Operational number of journey [betriebliche Fahrtnummer] at scheduled start stop-place [Geplanter Starthalt]. At least 'startJourneyNumber', 'startOperationalJourneyNumber', 'startDtid' oder 'startDfid' must be provided.

startTime.description: Scheduled start time [Geplante Startzeit] at scheduled start stop-place [Geplanter Starthalt] as fully-qualified-date (ISO-8601 with time-zone or offset).

JourneyMatchResponse.description: Single response to match journeys [Fahrten] / departures [Abfahrten] / arrivals [Ankünfte].

events.description: List of matched journey events in case matching of journey events has been requested. Empty in case no journey could be matched.

journeyID.description: ID of matched journey [Fahrt]. Empty in case no journey could be matched.

requestID.description: Request id in order to find particular request within request list. Take care that multiple responses may be linked to one request id in case matching wasn't unique.

evaNumber.description: Eva number of stop-place [Haltestelle]. Either 'evaNumber' or 'rl100' must be provided.

rl100.description: RL-100 code of stop-place [Haltestelle]. Either 'evaNumber' or 'rl100' must be provided.

JourneyRelation.description: Description of a journey [Fahrt] by key attributes, that are summarized as journey relation [Fahrtrelation].

endEvaNumber.description: Eva number of scheduled end stop-place [Geplanter Zielhalt].

endTime.description: Scheduled end time [Geplante Zielzeit] at scheduled end stop-place [Geplanter Zielhalt] as fully-qualified-date (ISO-8601 with time-zone or offset).

headerAdministrationID.description: Unique id of the header administration [Kopf-Verwaltung], may differ from startAdministrationID (for instance journeys has been created by DB Fernverkehr 80 but its operated by SNCF 81).

headerJourneyNumber.description: Header number of journey [Kopf-Fahrtnummer] at scheduled start stop-place [Geplanter Starthalt], may differ from startNumber.

startAdministrationID.description: Unique id of the administration [Verwaltung] at scheduled start stop-place [Geplanter Starthalt].

startCategory.description: Category [externe Fahrtgattung nach Ausgabensteurerung] at scheduled start stop-place [Geplanter Starthalt].

startEvaNumber.description: Eva number of scheduled start stop-place [Geplanter Starthalt].

startJourneyNumber.description: Number of journey [Fahrtnummer] at scheduled start stop-place [Geplanter Starthalt].

startTime.description: Scheduled start time [Geplante Startzeit] at scheduled start stop-place [Geplanter Starthalt] as fully-qualified-date (ISO-8601 with time-zone or offset).

displayPriority.description: Display priority [Anzeigereihenfolge aka 'Priorität*] for message. Order is ascending.

displayPriorityDetail.description: Detailed display priority [detaillierte Anzeigereihenfolge aka 'Feinsortierung'] for message. Order is ascending.

messageID.description: ID of message that is unique within all message collections.

cause.description:
Cause for disruption [Stoerungsursache].
- UNKNOWN_CAUSE (cause is unknown [unbekannte Ursache])
- OTHER_CAUSE (cause is not unknown but different from all enumerated causes [nicht definierte Ursache])
- TECHNICAL_PROBLEM_RAILWAY_SECTION (due to a problem referring a railway section [Streckenstörung])
- TECHNICAL_PROBLEM_VEHICLE (due to a technical problem [technische Störung])
- TECHNICAL_PROBLEM_OTHER (due to a technical problem [technische Störung])
- STRIKE (due to strike [Streik / Arbeitskamp])
- DEMONSTRATION (due to demonstration [Demonstration])
- ACCIDENT (due to an accident [Unfall])
- HOLIDAY (due to holidays [Ferien])
- WEATHER_STORM (due to bad weather [Unwetter])
- WEATHER_HEAT (due to bad weather [Hitze])
- WEATHER_WINTER (due to bad weather [Winterwitterung])
- MAINTENANCE (due to maintenance [Wartungsarbeiten an der Infrastruktur / den Fahrzeugen])
- CONSTRUCTION (due to construction [Bauarbeiten])
- POLICE_ACTIVITY (due to police activity [Polizeieinsatz])
- MEDICAL_EMERGENCY (due to a medical emergency [Notarzteinsatz])

displayPriority.description: Display priority [Anzeigereihenfolge] for disruption-communication. Order is ascending.

effect.description:
Effect of distruption communication [Stoerungsauswirkung].
- NO_SERVICE (no service possible [Betriebseinstellung])
- MASSIVE_IMPAIRMENT (possible effects apply to all kinds of services  [Massive Beeinträchtigungen])
- IMPAIRMENT (consequences apply to different services [Beeinträchtigungen])
- REDUCED_SERVICE (cancellations of journey  [Fahrtausfälle])
- MODIFIED_SERVICE ([Fahrtänderungen])
- DETOUR ([Umleitungen])
- STOP_MOVED ([Haltausfälle])
- SIGNIFICANT_DELAYS ([Verspätungen])
- ADDITIONAL_SERVICE ([Ersatzverkehr])
- OTHER_EFFECT ([Andere Beeinträchtigungen])
- UNKNOWN_EFFECT ([Unbekannte Auswirkung]

hasAlternatives.description: Incidates whether alternatives [alternative Verbindungen] are available for this particular disruption-communication.

messageID.description: ID of message that is unique within all message collections.

category.description: Optional category of message, like for instance 'Bauarbeiten' or 'Informationen'.

displayPriority.description: Display priority [Anzeigereihenfolge] for note. Order is ascending.

Messages.description:
Container to deduplicate messages [Störungskommunikationen, Fahrtmerkmale, Hinweise, RIS Kundengründe oder RIS Qualitätsabweichungen] in order to assign them to journeys [Fahrten], journey-events [Fahrtereignisse wie Abfahrt und Ankunft] and stop-places [Haltestellen].
- messages are provided once and may be referenced multiple times [z.B. ein Fahrtmerkmal für alle Fahrtereignisse oder eine Störungskommunikation für alle Abfahrten]
- ids are not stable and only valid within the provided context (ie first journey request may have different message ids than second request for the same journey)
- ids are unique over all buckets

info.description:
## Info

* powered by [DB Reisendeninformation](https://db-planet.deutschebahn.com/pages/reisendeninformation/apps/content/willkommen)
* member of the [RIS-API](https://db.de/ris-api) family, the building kit for traveller information
* for details check out [RIS::Journeys](https://api-portal.hub.db.de/db/apis/product/ris-journeys) in the DB API Portal

## Capabilities

### Journey-Information

Provides detailed information for a particular journey [Fahrt] or a batch of up to 500 journeys, including:

* information on transport like journey-number [Fahrtnummer], category [externe Fahrtgattung], line [Linie], administration [Verwaltung], transport-type [Produktklasse] and direction
  texts [Richtungstexte]
* departures [Abfahrten] and arrivals [Ankünfte] with information on cancellation [Haltausfall], additional [Zusatzhalt] and cancelled additional [zurückgenommener Zusatzhalt]
* detailed information on schedule [Soll], forecast [Vorschau] and real times and scheduled and real platforms [Plattform / Gleis / Bussteig etc.] on a journey-event [Fahrtereignis] level
* references to other transports representing replacement [Ersatz], relief [Entlastung], travels with [Vereinigung] including separation at [Trennung in] and continuation [Durchbindung]
* cancelled stops [Haltausfall], additional stops [Zusatzhalt], cancelled additional stops [zurückgenommene Zusatzhalte] additional textual information [Freitexte] and possible restrictions on
  changing passengers [Fahrgastwechsel] and on demand stops [Bedarfshalt]
* messages like disruptions [Störungen / Störungskommunikationen], attributes [Fahrtattribute / Sollmerkmale], ris cause codes [RIS Kundengrüner], ris quality deviations [RIS Qualitätsabweichungen]
  and general notes [Hinweistexte]
* and much more

### Journey-Searches

Powerful search functionallity for finding journeys by their journey-relation [fachliche Fahrt-Relation] or by attributes of a particular journey-event [Fahrtereignis], like

* date [Kalendertag der Fahrt]
* journey number [Fahrtnummer]
* administration [Verwaltung]
* category [externe Gattung]
* line [Linienname]
* transport-types [Produktklassen]

### Journey-Matching

Powerful matching functionallity for matching journeys [Fahrten] and particular journey-events [Fahrtereignisse] by many criterias like

* date [Kalendertag der Fahrt]
* journey number [Fahrtnummer]
* administration [Verwaltung]
* category [externe Gattung]
* line [Linienname]
* transport-types [Produktklassen]
* scheduled journey start stop-place [Geplanter Starthalt]
* scheduled journey start time [Geplante Startzeit]
* scheduled journey end stop-place [Geplanter Zielhalt]
* scheduled journey end time [Geplante Zielzeit]

Note that the matching takes into account that dates [Datumssprünge], categories, lines and journey-numbers may change within a journey[Änderung im Laufweg].


### Asynchronous change-notifications

The RIS-API event-system [RIS::Events](https://db-planet.deutschebahn.com/pages/reisendeninformation-ris-api/apps/content/events) can be used to get push-notifications in case information within RIS::
Journeys changes. This enables use-cases like:

* refreshing ui in case information changes
* doing something in your backend in case information changes
* caching information and invalidate cache in case information changes

## Getting Started

* visit our [documentation](https://ris-api.gitpages.tech.rz.db.de), learn how to [get started with openapi](https://developer-docs.deutschebahn.com/doku/apis/openapi.html) or how
  to [get started with asyncapi](https://developer-docs.deutschebahn.com/doku/apis/asyncapi.html) and check out our [coding-examples](https://developer-docs.deutschebahn.com/doku/apis)
* bounty hunter, bug finder or just idea creator, we are thirsty to hear from you - get in touch with us by using [DB AnwenderEcho](https://anwenderecho.extranet.deutschebahn.com/ris-api/) or write
  an [email](mailto:ris-api@deutschebahn.com)
## Changelog

<details>

### 2.12.0

#### Added

* added `scheduledStartTime ` to `JourneyInfo` object
* added `includeOnlyJourneyInfo` to `JourneyBatchRequest`

### 2.11.1

#### Added

* added `flightnumber` to `/find` to enable searching for journeys by code-shares
* added `journeyDescription` to `/find` to enable searching for journeys by their description
* added `dtid` and `dfid` to `/find` in order to enable searching for dtids and dfids as well
* added `startDtid` and `startDfid` to `/match/by-start-end` in order to enable matching for dtids and dfids as well
* added `dtid` and `dfid` to `/match/by-events` in order to enable matching for dtids and dfids as well
* added `operationalJourneyNumber` to `/match/by-events` in order to query for operational journey-number as well
* added `operationalJourneyNumber` to `/match/by-start-end` in order to query for operational journey-number as well
* added `operationalJourneyNumber` to all transport-objects in order to return operational journey-numbers as well

#### Changed

* made `startJourneyNumber` in `JourneyMatchJourneyStartEnd` optional in order to search for journey- or operational journey-number
* changed docs for `journeyNumber` in `/find` to indicate that searches are also matching against operation journey-numbers

### 2.10.0

#### Added

* added `disruptionID` to `MessageNote`
* added `displayPriority` to `MessageNote`
* added `vehicleSequenceAvailable` flag to `JourneyEvent` in order to indicate the presence of a vehicle-sequence

#### Changed

* made `disruptionID` and `disruptionCommunicationID` on `MessageDisruptionCommunication` required

### 2.9.3

#### Changed

* made structures `links`, `images` and `attachments` in `DisruptionCommunicationDescription` and `MessageNoteDescription` not required

### 2.9.1

#### Fixed

* fixed wrong defaults for `languages`

### 2.9.0

#### Added

* added `links`, `images` and `attatchements` structures to `DisruptionCommunicationDescription` and `MessageNoteDescription`
* added `hasAlternatives` to `DisruptionCommunicationDescription`
* added `languages` to all interfaces in order to enable the caller how many languages he wants to be returned for messages and disruption-communications

### 2.8.1

#### Added

* added `cause` and `effect` to `MessageDisruptionCommunication`
* added `langDe`, `langEn`, `langFr`, `langIt`, `langCs`, `langDa`, `langEs`, `langNl` and `langPl` to `MessageNote`
* deprecated `text` and `textShort` in `MessageNote`
* added `disruptionCommunicationID` to `MessageNote`

### 2.7.0

#### Added

* added `dfid` and `dtid` to `Transport`, `TransportDestinationRef`, `TransportDestinationContinuationRef`, `TransportDestinationPortionWorkingRef`, `TransportOriginRef`, `TransportOriginContinuationRef` and `TransportWithDirection` in order to identify transport with their dfid- and dtid-keys
* added `ifopt` to `StopPlaceEmbedded`, `StopPlaceEmbeddedWithCancel`, `StopPlaceInJourney` and `StopPlaceDifferingInJourney` in order to identify stop-places with dhid-keys

### 2.6.1

#### Changed

* major refactorings of endpoint `/match` for machine-2-machine matching of journeys and journey-events
** max value for `timeTolerance` set to 10m
** moved `timeTolerance` from `JourneyMatchRequest` to `JourneyBatchMatchRequest` 
** max length for `requestID` set to 50
** reduced batch size to 50 (before 500)
** added documentation that `line` must be combined with `administrationID`
** separated matching by start/end and by events in different endpoints

### 2.5.0

#### Added

* added `langFr`, `langIt`, `langCs`, `langDa`, `langEs`, `langNl` and `langPl` to `MessageDisruptionCommunication`

### 2.4.0

#### Added

* added new endpoint `/match` for machine-2-machine matching of journeys and journey-events

### 2.3.0

#### Added

* added `endEvaNumber` and `endTime` to `JourneyRelation`

### 2.2.0

#### Added

* added enum value `CHARTER_TRAIN` to `TransportTypeEnum`
* added `platformScheduleIfopt` and `platformIfopt` to `JourneyEvent` in order to provide dhid keys for platforms

### 2.1.1

#### Added

* added `journeyDescription` and `categoryInternal` to all transport-objects (`Transport`, `TransportDestinationRef`, `TransportOriginRef` and `TransportWithDirection`)

### 2.0.27

#### Changed

* fixed wrong length for `arrivalOrDepartureID`, `departureID` and `arrivalID` from `10` to `12`

### 2.0.26

#### Changed

* Changed object for `continuationFor` from `TransportOriginRef` to `TransportOriginContinuationRef` in `JourneyEventBased`
* Changed object for `continuationBy` from `TransportDestinationRef` to `TransportOriginDestinationRef` in `JourneyEventBased`

#### Added

* Added `TransportOriginContinuationRef` and `TransportOriginDestinationRef` in order to reflect continuation that may not happen at the beginning / end of the journey

</details>

get.description:
Finds a journey [Fahrtverlauf] by its journey-relation [Fahrtrelation].

 Search results are sorted by scheduled start time [Geplante Startzeit] ASC, journey-id [Fahrt-ID] ASC.

get.summary: Finds a journey by its relation

get.description:
Finds journeys that match the provided search criterias. Endpoint is designed for machine 2 user interactions.
A journey matches the search criterias in case at least one journey-event [Fahrtereignis] of the journey matches. For instance:
- search for '12' will return 'ICE 12', 'IC 12, 'Bus 12', 'S 12' etc.
- search for 'IC 12' will also return 'ICE 12' that starts as an 'ICE' but changes its category to 'IC' within its stops
- search for administration [Verwaltung] '80' will also return journeys that have other additional administrations than '80' within their stops [z.B. Wechsel der Verwaltung an der Grenze]
- search for 'RE 74' at '2023-07-12' will return the 'RE 74' that starts at '2023-07-11 23:55:00' and travels the rest of its journey at '2023-07-12' but will also return the 'RE 74' that starts at '2023-07-12 23:55:00' that travels the rest of its journey at '2023-07-13' [Fahrten über die Datumsgrenze]

 Take care that at least 'number' or 'line' has to be provided. Search results are sorted by scheduled start time [Geplante Startzeit] ASC, journey-id [Fahrt-ID] ASC.

parameters.description: date (yyyy-MM-dd) of journey-event [Fahrtereignis] at timezone 'Europe/Berlin', if omitted defaults to today (max of 7 days in the past is allowed)
parameters.name: date

parameters.description: journey-description [Fahrtbezeichnung] (at least 'journeyDescription', 'journeyNumber', 'line', 'dtid', 'dfid' or 'flightNumber' has to be provided)
parameters.name: journeyDescription

parameters.description: journey-number [Fahrtnummer] (at least 'journeyDescription', 'journeyNumber', 'line', 'dtid', 'dfid' or 'flightNumber'), may also match against operational journey-number [betriebliche Fahrtnummer]
parameters.name: journeyNumber

parameters.description: administration-id [Verwaltungs-ID]
parameters.name: administrationID

parameters.description: category of journey [externe Fahrtgattung nach Ausgabensteuerung]
parameters.name: category

parameters.description: line of journey [Linie] (at least 'number' or 'line' has to be provided)
parameters.name: line

parameters.description: deutschlandweite Fahrt ID (DFID) (at least 'journeyDescription', 'journeyNumber', 'line', 'dtid', 'dfid' or 'flightNumber')
parameters.name: dtid

parameters.description: deutschlandweite Teil-Linien ID (DTID) (at least 'journeyDescription', 'journeyNumber', 'line', 'dtid', 'dfid' or 'flightNumber')
parameters.name: dfid

parameters.description: flight-number [Flugnummer], in case journey is linked to a flight via code-shares (at least 'journeyDescription', 'journeyNumber', 'line', 'dtid', 'dfid' or 'flightNumber')
parameters.name: flightNumber

parameters.description:
transport-types [Produktklassen] that should be returned, possible values are:
- HIGH_SPEED_TRAIN (High speed train [Hochgeschwindigkeitszug])
- INTERCITY_TRAIN (Inter city train [Intercityzug])
- INTER_REGIONAL_TRAIN (Inter regional train [Interregiozug])
- REGIONAL_TRAIN (Regional train [Regionalzug])
- CITY_TRAIN (City train [S-Bahn])
- SUBWAY (Subway [U-Bahn])
- TRAM (Tram [Strassenbahn])
- BUS (Bus [Bus])
- FERRY (Ferry [Faehre])
- SHUTTLE (Shuttle [Ruftaxi])
- FLIGHT (Flight [Flug])
- CHARTER_TRAIN (Charter train [Charterzug])
- UNKNOWN (Unknown)

if empty, CHARTER_TRAIN won't be returned by default
parameters.name: transportTypes

parameters.description: pagination offset parameter in order to navigate through result list, defaults to 0
